title: CASA; record confidentiality
doc_html:
Art. 424.9.  CASA; record confidentiality

All records maintained by the CASA volunteer and the CASA program shall be confidential and shall not be disclosed except as provided by Article 412.

Acts 1999, No. 275, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
